products.name: Formula 1 Nutritional Shake Mix
products.sku: Vanilla #1247 · Chocolate #1248 · Mango #1249 · Strawberry #1239 · Kulfi #4114 · + more
products.description: A nutritious, low-glycaemic meal replacement shake packed with high-quality soy protein, dietary fibre, and 18 vitamins & minerals. Clinically tested and the #1 meal replacement brand globally.
benefits: 9g high-quality soy protein isolate per serving (PDCAAS = 1)
3g dietary fibre + 18 vitamins & minerals per serving
Tested Low Glycaemic Index (ISO 26642 methodology)
Only 94 kcal per serving of powder
Available in 9+ flavours including Paan, Rose Kheer & Kulfi
products.howToUse: Weight Loss: 2 shakes/day + 1 balanced meal · Weight Management: 1 shake/day · Mix 3 scoops (25g) with 300ml skimmed milk or ShakeMate + water

products.name: ShakeMate
products.description: Replace skimmed milk in your Formula 1 shake with ShakeMate — a high-protein, low-fat milk & soy drink mix that's also Low GI. Makes your shake taste great anywhere, anytime.
benefits: 10.75g high-quality protein per serving
Vitamin D + Calcium for bone support
Low GI tested · 1/3rd lactose vs regular milk
Contains natural sweetener Stevia, no added sugar
products.howToUse: Mix 1 scoop (25g) with 200ml water, use as milk replacement in Formula 1 shakes.

products.name: Personalized Protein Powder
products.description: Add extra protein to any meal or beverage. Unflavoured, so it blends seamlessly into shakes, soups, or curds without changing the taste.
benefits: 5g pure protein per teaspoon serving
Soy + whey protein blend for complete amino acid profile
Virtually tasteless and odourless
Easily mixes into Formula 1 or any drink
products.howToUse: Add 1–2 teaspoons (5–10g) to any meal, shake, or beverage.

products.name: Formula 2 Multivitamin Mineral & Herbal Tablets Plus
products.description: Comprehensive multivitamin and mineral supplement with herbal actives to fill nutritional gaps in your daily diet, especially while on calorie-controlled programs.
benefits: 21 essential vitamins & minerals in one tablet
Includes herbal extracts: Echinacea, Ginseng, Valerian
Antioxidants: Vitamins C, E, Beta-Carotene
Supports energy metabolism and immune function
products.howToUse: Take 3 tablets daily with meals.
ingredients: Vitamins A, C, D, E, K, B-complex

products.name: Cell Activator
products.description: Helps your body absorb nutrients and convert food into energy more efficiently at a cellular level, supporting overall wellness during a nutrition program.
benefits: Alpha-lipoic acid for cellular energy production
Aloe vera to support nutrient absorption
B-vitamins (B1, B2, B6) for energy metabolism
Inositol for cellular health

products.name: Cell-U-Loss
products.description: Supports healthy fluid balance in the body with corn silk extract and key electrolytes, helping reduce bloating and water retention.
benefits: Corn silk extract for fluid balance support
Electrolytes: Potassium, Sodium, Chloride
Vitamin C for skin health
Promotes a toned appearance

products.name: Herbal Control
products.description: A botanical blend designed to support appetite management and healthy digestion, making it easier to stick to your calorie goals.
benefits: Chromium for blood glucose balance
Garcinia Cambogia extract
Green tea extract with EGCG

products.name: H24 Rebuild Strength
products.description: A 3-in-1 post-workout formula combining protein, carbohydrates, and creatine monohydrate to support muscle recovery and strength gains after intense training.
benefits: 25g protein per serving for muscle repair
5g creatine monohydrate per serving
Carbohydrates to replenish muscle glycogen
NSF Certified for Sport® — banned substance tested
products.howToUse: Mix 3 scoops (75g) with 300–400ml water within 30 minutes post-workout.

products.name: H24 Hydrate
products.description: A light, low-calorie electrolyte drink to maintain hydration before, during, and after exercise. Available in lemon and watermelon flavours.

Only 8 kcal per serving
Vitamin C for immune support during exercise
No artificial colours, NSF Certified for Sport®

products.name: Afresh Energy Drink Mix
products.description: A light, low-calorie herbal energy drink powered by green tea extract. Available in 8 flavours including Lemon, Peach, and Elaichi Cardamom.
benefits: Green tea extract — 85mg EGCG antioxidants per serving
Only 7 kcal per serving
Guarana extract for gentle, sustained energy
No artificial sweeteners

products.name: Lifto®
products.description: A pre-workout energy and focus formula with clinically studied ingredients to power your training sessions, without excessive stimulants.
benefits: Beta-Alanine for endurance and reduced fatigue
L-Citrulline for improved blood flow

B-vitamins for energy metabolism

products.name: Simply Probiotic
products.description: A daily probiotic with 1 billion CFU of Lactobacillus acidophilus NCFM® to support a healthy gut microbiome and immune function.
benefits: 1 billion CFU Lactobacillus acidophilus NCFM® per sachet

Dissolves instantly in water, tasteless
Supports immune health via gut-immune axis

products.name: Herbal Aloe Concentrate
products.description: Inner leaf aloe vera concentrate with no aloin — the active compound that causes laxative effects. Soothes the digestive tract and supports nutrient absorption.
benefits: Inner leaf aloe vera (aloin-free)
Supports healthy digestion and bowel comfort
Peppermint and Chamomile extracts for soothing effect
Mix with water for a refreshing digestive drink

products.description: A convenient capsule form of aloe vera for those who prefer not to drink the concentrate, delivering the same digestive soothing benefits.

products.name: Active Fiber Complex
